name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem. 0.27.0: cubit_mesh_race_review (wait-all + shortlist sorted by min-Jacobian + persisted history) + cubit_mesh_apply_choice (human picks from shortlist) + quality_summary probe. Pivots from auto-commit to human-decides. 0.26.0 base: cubit_mesh_race_smart auto-generates N candidates from geometry.
author: Kengo Sugahara
